model.summary: Hl combines the speed permitted from the signal with the speed expected at the next main signal.

currentSpeedEncoding.lineSpeed: No lower speed light or strip
currentSpeedEncoding.100: Lower yellow light plus green strip
currentSpeedEncoding.60: Lower yellow light plus yellow strip

aspects.title: Proceed at line speed
aspects.meaning: Proceed at the permitted line speed. Expect line speed at the next main signal.
playerAction: Proceed at the permitted speed.

aspects.title: Proceed at 100, then line speed
aspects.meaning: Proceed at no more than 100 km/h. Expect line speed at the next main signal.
playerAction: Reduce to 100 km/h by the signal if required.
Proceed at no more than 100 km/h through the applicable area.

aspects.title: Proceed at 40, then line speed
aspects.meaning: Proceed at no more than 40 km/h. Expect line speed at the next main signal.
playerAction: Reduce to 40 km/h by the signal.

aspects.title: Proceed at 60, then line speed
aspects.meaning: Proceed at no more than 60 km/h. Expect line speed at the next main signal.
playerAction: Reduce to 60 km/h by the signal.

aspects.title: Proceed, expect 100
aspects.meaning: Proceed at the permitted line speed. Expect a reduction to 100 km/h at the next main signal.
playerAction: Proceed at the current permitted speed.
Prepare to reach 100 km/h at the next signal.

aspects.title: Proceed at 100, expect 100
aspects.meaning: Proceed at no more than 100 km/h and expect 100 km/h at the next main signal.
playerAction: Observe 100 km/h.

aspects.title: Proceed at 40, expect 100
aspects.meaning: Proceed at no more than 40 km/h and expect 100 km/h at the next main signal.
playerAction: Reduce to 40 km/h by the signal.

aspects.title: Proceed at 60, expect 100
aspects.meaning: Proceed at no more than 60 km/h and expect 100 km/h at the next main signal.
playerAction: Reduce to 60 km/h by the signal.

aspects.title: Proceed, expect 40 or 60
aspects.meaning: Proceed at the permitted line speed. Expect a reduction to 40 or 60 km/h at the next main signal.
playerAction: Begin braking for a restrictive speed at the next signal.
The exact 40 or 60 km/h value will be shown there.

aspects.title: Proceed at 100, expect 40 or 60
aspects.meaning: Proceed at no more than 100 km/h. Expect 40 or 60 km/h at the next main signal.
playerAction: Observe 100 km/h.
Brake for the next restrictive speed.

aspects.title: Proceed at 40, expect 40 or 60
aspects.meaning: Proceed at no more than 40 km/h. Expect 40 or 60 km/h at the next main signal.
playerAction: Reduce to and maintain no more than 40 km/h.

aspects.title: Proceed at 60, expect 40 or 60
aspects.meaning: Proceed at no more than 60 km/h. Expect 40 or 60 km/h at the next main signal.
playerAction: Reduce to no more than 60 km/h.
Prepare for the speed shown at the next signal.

aspects.title: Proceed, expect stop
aspects.meaning: Proceed at the permitted line speed and expect the next main signal to show stop.
playerAction: Acknowledge PZB when the associated 1000 Hz influence is active.
Brake to stop before the next main signal.

aspects.title: Proceed at 100, expect stop
aspects.meaning: Proceed at no more than 100 km/h and expect the next main signal to show stop.
playerAction: Observe 100 km/h.
Acknowledge PZB when required and brake to stop at the next signal.

aspects.title: Proceed at 40, expect stop
aspects.meaning: Proceed at no more than 40 km/h and expect the next main signal to show stop.
playerAction: Reduce to 40 km/h by the signal.
Acknowledge PZB when required and prepare to stop.

aspects.title: Proceed at 60, expect stop
aspects.meaning: Proceed at no more than 60 km/h and expect the next main signal to show stop.
playerAction: Reduce to 60 km/h by the signal.
Acknowledge PZB when required and prepare to stop.

aspects.title: Stop
playerAction: Stop before the signal and do not pass without authority.

sources.title: Hl-Signalsystem
sources.notes: Aspect meanings cross-reference DB InfraGO Ril 301.0103 as cited by the source.
